stemHtml: Although we have a field of vision of more than 180° it is important during flight to use the scanning technique, because…

options.a: only in the peripheral area of the retina resolution is good enough to see an object clearly.
options.b: only in the foveal area resolution is good enough to see an object clearly.
options.c: the reduction in the field of vision with decreasing altitude is due to a lack of vitamin A.
options.d: it is tiring to look continually in the same direction.
